name: FilterBar
description: Structured search and filter toolbar for List Report and Analytical List Page screens. Provides a row of filter fields with Go and Adapt Filters buttons. Lives in DynamicPageHeader — never in the content area. Never used on Worklist screens.

props.name: showGoButton
props.description: Shows the Go button for explicit search triggering. TEAM RULE: always set true — our SAP backend does not support live filtering. Never set false for server-side filtering.

props.name: filterBarExpanded
props.description: Initial expansion state of the filter bar. True (default) = filters visible. False = collapsed on load.

props.name: useToolbar
props.description: When true (default), shows the FilterBar toolbar containing the Go button and Adapt Filters button.

props.name: showAdaptFiltersButton
props.description: Shows the Adapt Filters button that opens the filter personalization dialog. Set false only if personalisation is explicitly not required.

props.name: filterCount
props.description: Number of active filter conditions. Shown as a badge on the Adapt Filters button. Update via binding when filter state changes.

props.name: search
props.description: Current search string. Updated when Go is pressed.

events.name: search
events.description: Fired when the Go button is pressed or Enter is hit in a filter field. Trigger the backend data load here.

events.name: filterChange
events.description: Fired when any filter value changes. Update filterCount binding here.

events.name: filtersDialogConfirm
events.description: Fired when the user confirms the Adapt Filters dialog.

slots.name: filterItems
slots.description: Individual filter fields. Each FilterItem has a label and a control (Input, Select, DateRangeSelection, MultiComboBox, etc.). Maximum 7 visible by default — additional filters go into the Adapt Filters dialog.

notes: FilterBar must be placed inside sap.f.DynamicPageHeader — never directly in DynamicPage content slot.
ONLY used on list-report and analytical-list-page floorplans.
NEVER place on worklist floorplan — the worklist is pre-scoped by the system.
showGoButton MUST be true for our team's server-side filtering — never set false.
Maximum 7 filter fields visible by default; additional ones go into the Adapt Filters dialog.
VariantManagement lives in DynamicPageTitle (heading slot), not inside FilterBar.

keyboard: Enter — trigger search (same as Go button)
Escape — clear focus from current field
notes: FilterBar should have an aria-label or aria-labelledby pointing to the page title.
Filter field labels must be associated with their controls via labelFor.
The Go button is the primary action — it must be reachable via keyboard without needing a mouse.

examples.title: List Report FilterBar with 3 filter fields
whenToUse: List Report screens where users search across a large open dataset
whenNotToUse: Worklist screens — the list is pre-scoped, no filter needed
Object Page screens — filtering is not applicable to a single entity
